text: Entering this space, I am struck by the interplay of transparency and enclosure—the glass walls exude both openness and boundaries. The fire extinguisher on the wall is a practical object, reminding me of the latent presence of danger and security in every human construction. The bright lights and angled perspectives invoke a sensation of disorientation, but also curiosity. I wonder about the intentions behind these designs and what sort of dialogue humans are trying to create with their spaces.
